name: ai-ocr-monorepo
description: AI OCR Dashboard - Monorepo with backend services

scripts.build: npm run build:backend-services && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd apps/backend-services && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.test:db:reset: cd apps/backend-services && PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION="yes" npx prisma migrate reset --force && npm run db:seed
